item.title: ‘I’m not made of money’: My heating engineer didn’t fix my radiators on his first visit. Do I pay him a second time?
item.description: “He charged $180 for the second visit for his time, including $40 for the part.”

item.title: ‘I love being debt-free’: I’m in my mid-50s and buying a house. Do I take out a $400K mortgage or use my Roth IRA?
item.description: “I’ll fund $500,000 of that from the sale of my current house.”

item.title: After bitcoin’s fall, pity those wildly enthusiastic investors who borrowed billions against crypto
item.description: The speculation that bitcoin would hit $200,000 in 2025 now seems like a dream. Because it was.

item.title: ‘Guests tell me I have dust bunnies’: My $150-an-hour cleaner has become increasingly negligent. Do I fire her?
item.description: ”I like her as a friend, but I’m underwhelmed as a client.”

item.title: There is a severe doctor shortage. How to find a good one.
item.description: What can you do if your doctor retires or quits?
